Notice Of Motion And Motion By Partition Referee For Confirmation Of Sale Of Real Property; Declaration Of Partition Referee
Off Calendar Jan-22-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances

Marie Barnes, Law Office of Marie Barnes, 415-266-9624 via zoom for plaintiff
Matthew Taylor, Partitioner, 909-989-7774, via zoom
Michael Raifsnider, Law Offices of Michael Raifsnider, in-person for and with defendant

Hearing held. No over bidder. Sale is confirmed. Mr. Raifsnider contests to the tentative as to the move out date. Matter discussed. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:

OTHER MATTHEW TAYLOR NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION BY PARTITION REFEREE FOR CONFIRMATION OF SALE OF REAL PROPERTY; DECLARATION OF PARTITION REFEREE

is confirmed. Motion is granted as to the order for the defendant to vacate the premises no later than March 1, 2025. Pursuant to stipulation, the request to amend the interlocutory judgment is granted.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)
